# ContestOps AI Strategic Brief

Version: `0.2.0`
Category: AI startup pitch
Deadline: 2026-06-10
Production readiness: 72%

## Winning Thesis

ContestOps AI should be judged as a live AI operations product: it converts messy startup opportunities into execution plans, evidence ledgers, pitch assets, structured payloads, and external submission workflows.

## Proof Priorities

- show the product operating end to end;
- make AI decisions inspectable through generated artifacts;
- tie every claim to an evidence slot;
- keep external submission automation receipt-backed;
- remove private applicant data from public artifacts.

## Strongest Evidence

- source_snapshot: `evidence/source_snapshot.md` (active).
- product_demo: `docs/PRODUCT_AI_PROPOSED.md` (active).
- traction_minimum: `docs/TRACTION_PROOF_MINIMUM.md` (planned).
- dealum_payload: `submission/dealum_payload.json` (active).
- automation_receipts: `automation/output` (active).

## Competitive Frame

Position against portals, proposal writers, grant databases, generic agents, and consultants. The wedge is full application operations for founders, not only discovery or writing.

## Closing Line

ContestOps AI turns deadline pressure into a repeatable AI operations workflow with checklists, evidence, payloads, and receipts.
